---
title: "Lesson Title"
description: "One-sentence description."
categories: [topic]
date: today
---

## Motivation

_Why this concept matters for cybersecurity._

## Haskell

```{=latex}
\input{exports/lesson-hs.tex}
```

```{.haskell filename="lesson.hs"}
-- inline snippet for HTML rendering
```

## Python

```{=latex}
\input{exports/lesson-py.tex}
```

```{.python filename="lesson.py"}
# inline snippet for HTML rendering
```
